blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Define concrete endpoint calls for guide assignment validation
Verify that at least 4 participants are required for guide assignment.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Guide assignment', which necessitates a minimum of 4 participants to run the tour. However, the evidence indicates that only 2 customers have booked, failing to meet this minimum requirement. This gap in participant numbers directly impacts the ability to assign a guide, thus confirming a failure in requirement coverage.
gaps: Only 2 customers have booked, failing to meet the minimum requirement of 4 participants for guide assignment.
